description: Configure the Jitsi Meet web interface to act as a 'Hospital Virtual Care' portal by modifying the interface_config.js file within the running Docker container. The configuration must set the DEFAULT_WELCOME_PAGE_TITLE to "Hospital Virtual Care", restrict SETTINGS_SECTIONS to only 'devices' and 'sounds', and set MOBILE_APP_PROMO to false. Verify the restricted settings at http://localhost:8080 and save a screenshot of the settings dialog to ~/Documents/restricted_settings.png.
